'''pafungu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ivoriness|ivoriness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ivoriness|ivoriness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pafungu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæfingith|pæfingith]] || [[word:pæfingij|pæfingij]] || [[word:pæfingish|pæfingish]] || [[word:pæfingi|pæfingi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafufunguth|pafufunguth]] || [[word:pafufunguj|pafufunguj]] || [[word:pafufungush|pafufungush]] || [[word:pafufungu|pafufungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafunguth|pafunguth]] || [[word:pafunguj|pafunguj]] || [[word:pafungush|pafungush]] || [[word:pafungu|pafungu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafufnguth|pafufnguth]] || [[word:pafufnguj|pafufnguj]] || [[word:pafufngush|pafufngush]] || [[word:pafufnguf|pafufnguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pafunguthu|pafunguthu]] || [[word:pafunguju|pafunguju]] || [[word:pafungushu|pafungushu]] || [[word:pafunguku|pafunguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pafunguth|pafunguth]] || [[word:pafunguj|pafunguj]] || [[word:pafungush|pafungush]] || [[word:pafungu|pafungu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pafunguthul|pafunguthul]] || [[word:pafungujul|pafungujul]] || [[word:pafungushul|pafungushul]] || [[word:pafungukul|pafungukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pafunguthuthu|pafunguthuthu]] || [[word:pafungujuju|pafungujuju]] || [[word:pafungushushu|pafungushushu]] || [[word:pafunguku|pafunguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pafunguthun|pafunguthun]] || [[word:pafungujun|pafungujun]] || [[word:pafungushun|pafungushun]] || [[word:pafungukun|pafungukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pafunguthuoro|pafunguthuoro]] || [[word:pafungujuoro|pafungujuoro]] || [[word:pafungushuoro|pafungushuoro]] || [[word:pafungukuoro|pafungukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
